description: Data-driven deprecated-terminology map for check-deprecated-terms.py. Each rule has a regex (or literal string), a replacement, and optional case/context guards. Edit this file — not the script — to add/remove rules.

rules.note: Renamed July 2023. First mention should use 'Microsoft Entra ID (previously Azure Active Directory)' for clarity; automation replaces subsequent mentions.
Short form of the old name. Skip cases where it appears immediately after 'Microsoft Entra ID (previously'.
Synapse capabilities are now part of Fabric. Review context before auto-replacing in migration / historical content.
Branding shift as of 2025. Review before auto-applying on pages that explain product history.
Licensing consolidation under Fabric. Verify commercial context before applying.
